raw_consumer_statement:
I brought my commercial truck to this repair shop for a complete repair, for which they quoted {$10000.00}. 
I paid {$5800.00} upfront via my Citi credit card to initiate the work. 
The shop claimed the repairs were complete, but my truck broke down before it could be used, proving the service was ineffective. 
Upon returning, they tried to charge additional unrelated fees, which they later backed off when challenged. 
They refused to perform an inspection unless I agreed to unnecessary and unrelated light repairs.
